name: Brown Rice Treats
recipeIngredient: 2 cups puffed rice cereal (brown rice type)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix peanut butter, honey, nuts, vanilla, and cinnamon together in a bowl.
2. Add the cereal to the mixture; stir very gently until the cereal is well coated.
3. Form the mixture into balls the size of walnuts using wet hands.
4. Place the balls on a lightly greased tray or waxed paper.
Note: To make the process easier, you can briefly microwave the peanut butter and honey to thin them slightly.
